name: app
description: Daily app inspiration and opportunity outputs.

steps.name: organize
steps.prompt: Generate daily app ideas for {date}. Use `python3 {root}/fetch_news.py --seen-keys app` to inspect prior app-idea titles/source keys and skip repeats. Gather current signals from app charts, Product Hunt/HN, app reviews, and accessible web sources; use `APP` as the source for generated app ideas/signals. Apply gold-app heuristics: high demand with low rating, stale incumbents, platform gaps, country gaps, and keyword supply gaps. Write `{root}/app/{date}.md` and `{root}/app/{date}.json`; JSON must be a flat array with only title, summary, url, and source fields. Do not commit or push. After writing, rerun `python3 {root}/daily_pipeline.py run --date {date} --source app`.
